title: Fashion & Garment E-Commerce Platform
summary: An all-in-one fashion commerce ecosystem split across three connected systems: a customer storefront, a reseller/agent portal, and an ERP back-office, with referral-driven sales and automated commission payouts.
challenge: A growing garment business needed more than a store: it needed a customer-facing storefront, a self-service portal for resellers and distributors, and a back-office to run operations, all working together so an agent's referral on the shopfront flows straight into fulfilment and commission payout.
approach: Unity Software Solution is building a three-system platform: E-Commerce Website, Agent Portal, and ERP/Admin, connected in real time. A customer orders on the storefront using an agent's referral link, the order lands in the ERP for fulfilment, and commission is auto-calculated and posted to the agent's wallet.
outcome: A scalable, growth-ready platform that unifies storefront sales, a multi-level reseller network, and back-office operations under one connected system. Currently in active development.
overview: The Fashion & Garment platform splits every feature across three core systems that work together in real time: a customer-facing E-Commerce Website, a reseller/distributor Agent Portal, and an ERP/Admin back-office.
It is designed to be all-in-one, scalable, and growth-ready, supporting referral-driven selling, multi-level agent networks, custom-tailoring measurements, and automated commission payouts.

How the three systems connect: a customer places an order on the E-Commerce site using an agent's referral link → the order appears in the ERP for fulfilment → commission is auto-calculated and posted to the Agent Portal wallet.
objectives: Give customers a rich storefront with browsing, custom measurements, and secure checkout
Let resellers self-serve through onboarding, dashboards, sharing tools, and payouts
Run back-office operations, including catalogue, orders, CRM, agents, and reporting, from one ERP
Tie storefront, agents, and operations together with referral-driven commission automation
Support multi-level (MLM) agent networks with per-tier commission models

modules.title: Product browsing
features: Browse by category (sarees, kurtis, kids wear…)

modules.title: Cart & checkout
features: Referral code / agent link applied at checkout

modules.title: Sharing & promotion
features: Share product links with ref code

modules.title: Product management
features: Add / edit garments with photos & videos

modules.title: Order management
features: Full order lifecycle (new → packed → shipped → delivered → returned)

modules.title: Agent management
features: Set commission rates per agent / tier

modules.title: Commission & payouts
features: Auto commission calculation on each order

workflow: Customer places an order on the E-Commerce site using an agent's referral link
The order appears in the ERP for fulfilment and is assigned to staff
Order moves through its lifecycle: packed → shipped → delivered
Commission is auto-calculated and posted to the Agent Portal wallet
Agent requests a payout; admin approves and disburses from the ERP
All three systems stay in sync to deliver a seamless experience
